decisionType: 控制股东私有化与双重保护
holdingZh: MFW 确立了控制股东私有化交易在自始同时满足独立特别委员会批准和多数少数股东同意两项程序保护时，可适用商业判断规则而非全体公平审查。
holdingEn: MFW held that a controller freeze-out can receive business-judgment review instead of entire-fairness review when, from the outset, it is conditioned on both approval by an independent special committee and an informed majority-of-the-minority vote.
